ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose generated Workona JSON file to import, or paste text into the text box
ast.target: 选择生成的 Workona JSON 文件进行导入，或将文本粘贴到文本框中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose previously generated Workona JSON file to import, or paste text into the text box. Use it to not override or duplicate resources.
ast.target: 选择之前生成的 Workona JSON 文件进行导入，或将文本粘贴到文本框中。使用它以避免覆盖或重复资源。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When ticked, existing Notes with a matching name will be overwritten by entries in the supplied JSON file. Otherwise will be ignored
ast.target: 勾选后，名称匹配的现有笔记将被提供的 JSON 文件中的条目覆盖。否则将被忽略

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the folder in your Obsidian Vault, which will be created if required
ast.target: 你的 Obsidian Vault 中的文件夹名称（如有需要将创建）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Press to start the Import Process

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 选择生成的 Workona JSON 文件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Choose previously generated Workona JSON file
ast.target: 选择之前生成的 Workona JSON 文件

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Name of Destination Folder in Vault
ast.target: Vault 中目标文件夹的名称
